Specimen, Microscope, Slides, crisp, sharp, delicate. 
- Specimen collected, slides prepared, microscope used for viewing, observations recorded. 
- Microscope lens cleaned, slide examined under light, results compared to controls. 
- Specimen labeled, slides stored in case, and microscopist ready for next session. 
- Slides examined for anomalies, microscope calibrated for accuracy, results documented meticulously. 


- Dedicated to the preservation of specimens, the microscopist meticulously analyzed the slides. 
- Microscope and slides were essential
